---
title: Le Croisic
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557486/lecroisic_20240704_p54xin.png
description: Visite du Croisic
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2024/07/04
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557486/lecroisic_20240704_p54xin.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
